title: eriogonum umbellatum var. argus
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. argus, also known as the Sulphur Buckwheat, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family and is native to the western parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum var. argus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin and wound health, and to soothe digestive issues.
